data.title: Eaton will announce Q3 2025 earnings on November 4, 2025, with a conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern time.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on NYSE under the ticker ETN, is set to release its third quarter financial results for 2025 on Tuesday, November 4, 2025. The report will be made public before the commencement of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. An earnings conference call is scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to delve into the specifics of the third quarter performance. Interested individuals can join the call through a live webcast available at the dedicated Eaton Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Results link on the company's official website, www.eaton.com.

data.title: Public companies possess $110B in BTC, with only select early adopters benefiting from the Bitcoin rise.
data.description: Currently, public companies collectively possess more than 1 million Bitcoin valued at around $110 billion on their balance sheets. However, significant gains have only been witnessed by early adopters who employed disciplined investment strategies.

data.title: ARB price plunges to $0.31 after $20B crypto liquidation and Trump tariff news, hitting key support level.
data.description: Arbitrum’s (ARB) current trading price stands at $0.31 after experiencing a significant liquidation cascade and an announcement of Trump tariffs. This development has led to the testing of a crucial support level close to the lower boundary of the Bollinger Band.

data.title: Delek US Holdings (NYSE: DK) to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 7, with conference call at 9:30am CT. Visit www.DelekUS.com for live broadcast.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. plans to release its third quarter 2025 results before the U.S. stock market opens on Friday, November 7, 2025. The company, listed as NYSE: DK, will hold a conference call to discuss these results starting at 9:30 a.m. CT (10:30 a.m. ET) on the same day. To access the live broadcast of the conference call, individuals can visit Delek US's website at www.DelekUS.com.

data.title: Delek Logistics Partners, LP will discuss Q3 2025 results in conference call on Nov 7th, 2025 at 11:00 a.m. CT/12:00 p.m. ET. Visit www.DelekLogistics.com for live broadcast.
data.description: Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, revealed plans to release a summary of their third quarter 2025 financial results before the U.S. stock market opens on Friday, November 7, 2025. The Partnership has scheduled a conference call to delve into these results, set to commence at 11:00 a.m. CT (12:00 p.m. ET) on the same day. Those interested can tune in to the live broadcast of the call on their official website, www.DelekLogistics.com.

data.title: Rackspace Technology sets Nov 6 for Q3 2025 earnings release.
data.description: Recently, it was reported that a new study has found that approximately 30% of children in low-income areas are experiencing food insecurity, with nearly 20% of them facing severe hunger. The study also revealed that around 40% of households with children are struggling to afford enough food during the ongoing pandemic. This alarming situation highlights the urgent need for more assistance and support for families in need, especially during these challenging times.

data.title: Flagstar Bank, N.A. from Hicksville, NY, completes holding company reorganization on October 17, 2025, streamlining corporate structure.
data.description: In Hicksville, New York, Flagstar Bank, N.A. revealed the successful finalization of its authorized holding company reorganization on October 17, 2025. This move, completed by the close of business on the same day, aims to streamline its corporate setup, enhancing operational efficiency.

data.title: Rivalry Corp closed second tranche of private placement, issuing 27.6M units at C$0.05 each for gross proceeds of C$1.38M.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Rivalry Corp. (TSXV: RVLY) (OTCQX: RVLCF) (FSE: 9VK), a prominent sportsbook and iGaming operator catering to digital-first consumers, completed the second part of its non-brokered private placement that was first mentioned on September 29, 2025. In this phase, the company issued 27,600,000 units at a rate of C$0.05 per unit, resulting in total earnings of C$1,380,000. Each unit comprises one subordinate voting share and one share purchase warrant, with each warrant allowing the purchase of one more share at C$0.10 until October 8, 2027. These shares and warrants are bound by a statutory four-month holding period as per relevant securities laws. The funds acquired from this private placement will be allocated towards corporate development and general operational needs.

data.title: President Trump vows more cuts to federal aid and workers during shutdown as agencies comply with court order to halt layoffs temporarily.
data.description: In a federal court proceeding, representatives from several agencies confirmed their compliance with a recent court directive that blocked the government from initiating layoffs amid the shutdown.

data.title: RxPost wins PitchLive.LA, receives over $50,000 in startup services from Gunderson Dettmer and Alpha Edison. LA Tech Week event.
data.description: Amantha Bagdon from RxPost was awarded over $50,000 in startup services by Gunderson Dettmer and Alpha Edison to support her entrepreneurial goals. The funding was granted as the grand prize to RxPost during PitchLive.LA event held on October 14, 2025, as part of LA Tech Week.

data.title: SKK Holdings Limited received a Nasdaq extension for non-compliance with minimum bid price of $1 per share, deadline missed.
data.description: Singapore-based civil engineering service provider SKK Holdings Limited, listed on Nasdaq as SKK, specializing in subsurface utility works, recently failed to meet Nasdaq's continued listing requirement due to its closing bid price falling below $1 per share for the period from February 28 to April 11, 2025. Nasdaq notified SKK of this on April 14, 2025, giving a 180-day compliance period, with a possible 180-day extension. However, as of October 13, 2025, SKK did not restore the minimum bid price, leading to non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2).

data.title: Liza Minnelli will present Janet Jackson with the 2025 ICON Award at Gala of the Stars benefiting Dancers Against Cancer.
data.description: On October 21, in Beverly Hills, California, two iconic figures will come together for a night of celebration and purpose at The Beverly Hilton. Liza Minnelli will make a special return to the stage for what is set to be a remarkable event in entertainment in 2025. This collaboration of legends is anticipated to draw significant attention and promises to deliver a memorable experience.

data.title: Aptos (APT) hits 52-week low at $3.20 amid Bitcoin pressure on altcoin market.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aptos (APT) is currently trading at $3.20, hitting its lowest point in the past 52 weeks. This decline is attributed to the overall market dip in Bitcoin, which is also affecting other digital currencies in the sector.

data.title: Permianville Royalty Trust $0.03 distribution per unit on Nov 14, 2025 for unitholders - based on oil & gas production data.
data.description: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) declared a cash distribution of $0.030000 per unit for its beneficial interest holders, set to be paid out on November 14, 2025. Unitholders as of October 31, 2025, will be eligible for this distribution. This distribution is based on the net profits interest, which is calculated using oil production data from July 2025 and natural gas production figures from June 2025. Additionally, accrued costs from August 2025 are factored into this calculation.

data.title: Venture Global, Inc. schedules Q3 2025 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: A new report indicates that global carbon dioxide emissions reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2020 despite the pandemic-induced lockdowns. This marks a 2% increase from the previous year. China remains the top emitter with 10.1 billion metric tons, followed by the United States with 5.3 billion metric tons. Researchers warn that urgent action is needed to curb these rising emissions and combat climate change. The findings underscore the need for countries to prioritize sustainability and transition to renewable energy sources to mitigate the impact on the environment.

data.title: Roche presents new data on vamikibart for uveitic macular edema, showing potential for vision improvement. Key numbers: 2 phase III studies, 0.25 and 1 mg doses tested, results presented at AAO 2025.
data.description: Roche disclosed today findings from two phase III trials investigating the effectiveness and safety of vamikibart in treating uveitic macular edema, a condition marked by fluid accumulation in the macula due to uveitis in the eye. This study compared two vamikibart doses (0.25 and 1 mg) with a simulated IVT injection. The results, presented at the American Academy of Ophthalmology annual meeting in Orlando, Florida, showed promising outcomes. Both studies demonstrated potential for rapid vision improvements and reduced macular swelling with vamikibart treatment, hinting at its efficacy in managing UME.

data.title: NEAR Protocol tests support at $2.15 as Bitcoin hovers above $115,000, indicating potential downside.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $2.15 amidst a challenging overall cryptocurrency market. Technical indicators are indicating a potential for further decline, especially as Bitcoin encounters resistance at levels exceeding $115,000.
